g","timestamp":"2026-05-06 21:45:01","what is the meaning of life":42,"when
 were crayons invented":"1903"}

mp":"2026-05-06 21:45:01"}

","speed":88,"timestamp":"2026-05-06 21:45:01"}

ong logs, and PTerm will automatically wrap them for you! Say goodbye to te
xt, that has weird line breaks!","timestamp":"2026-05-06 21:45:01","very":"
long"}
